title: coordinate.run task payload (v1 — M2: eval-only batch)
description: Input for the coordinator's coordinate.run skill. M2 scope: goal=evaluate fan-out over a URL list (feature parity with the legacy batch mode). Generate/migrate routes land at M3.

goal.description: M2: evaluate only. M3 adds migrate | generate+migrate | full-loop | auto.

targets.description: Pages to evaluate. Each target × fanOut becomes one eval.run child task.

fanOut.description: Repeat count per target — run-once vs run-10x is just this number (variance experiments).
